arts.ttl: 'I am scratching my head' - Roy Keane swears during angry Manchester United rant
arts.sum: Iconic former Man United captain Roy Keane has sent a rallying cry to Ruben Amorim's players ahead of the new head coach's first taste of the Manchester derby.

arts.ttl: 'Oh my . . . Why ask me that?' - The Man City question that left Pep Guardiola speechless
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola made his feelings clear about the reasons for Manchester City's drastic loss of form, and offered a grave prediction about their future prospects

arts.ttl: Man City have an obvious Paul Pogba free transfer decision to make amid Rodri injury
arts.sum: Manchester City have been linked with a sensational free transfer move for former Manchester United midfielder Paul Pogba.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Manchester United LIVE! Premier League match stream, team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: Man City vs Man United - LIVE!

arts.ttl: Man United 'at the head of the queue' for generational talent with Ruben Amorim viewing him as 'the key piece'
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly at the head of the queue for Sunderland teenager Chris Rigg, who is on the radar of a number of England's biggest clubs.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola Admits Man City Could Fire Him If Results Don't Improve
arts.sum: Manchester City have won just one match from their last 10 in all competitions, their worst run of form since Guardiola took charge in 2016.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer names five Sir Jim Ratcliffe decisions that caused chaos at Manchester United
arts.sum: Manchester United have been under the stewardship of Ineos since February and it has been a rollercoaster first year for them in charge

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson's 'private view' on Man Utd star Marcus Rashford speaks volumes
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has spent his entire career at Manchester United but speculation about his future is rife amid another difficult season on the pitch

arts.ttl: Man Utd target Matheus Cunha's feelings clear as Wolves U-turn on Gary O'Neil
arts.sum: As Gary O’Neil’s torrid Wolves tenure ends, one of the club’s brighter lights, Matheus Cunha, has made his opinion on the sacking and a potential Man Utd switch clear

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford is 'miles off the player he was two years ago', claims Alan Shearer - as he admits he's been left BAFFLED by Man United star's struggles, with forward available for £40m in January
arts.sum: Rashford netted just eight times last season, while he has scored four Premier League goals this time around and struggled to nail down a regular place since Amorim came in.
